title: A vadászokra vonatkozó járványvédelmi alapelvek
description: A set of biosecurity guidelines for hunters targeting wild birds, aimed at minimizing the transmission risk of high pathogenic avian influenza, Newcastle disease, and other diseases to poultry. It outlines key principles, reporting procedures, and specific measures such as protective equipment use, disinfection, containment of carcasses, and post-hunt quarantine periods.
